title: GroupDef
description: A group archetype (HZD Part 2): which roles exist (in fill-priority order), how stale shared knowledge may get, and how alert decays. The runtime group agent is non-physical — a member list, a scoped blackboard, an alert level, and role assignments.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

roles.description: Role def IDs in fill-priority order (first roles fill first).

staleness.description: Per-key staleness thresholds in seconds for member reads (latency is a feature — HZD Part 5).

alertDecaySeconds.description: Seconds without fresh threat knowledge before the alert level steps down one stage.

minMembers.description: Below this, surviving members become candidates for passport recycling.

passports.description: Passports this group accepts when the collective recycles strays.
